subcategory: Animated landing hero with gradient text
use_cases: Marketing landing pages for SaaS products
Product homepage hero sections with animated entrances
App landing pages with call-to-action buttons
ai_summary: An animated hero section component featuring a glass-morphism badge, gradient text headline, and staggered fade-in animations using Framer Motion. Includes dual CTA buttons with icons and responsive typography scaling. Designed for SaaS and developer tool landing pages.
